title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: Someone stole my bicycle last night.

questions.firstSentence: The teacher said to us, 'Open your books.'
questions.secondSentence: The teacher (1) _________ to open our books.

questions.firstSentence: I don't have a car, so I can't drive to work.
questions.secondSentence: If I had a car, I (1) _________ to work.

questions.firstSentence: She is too short to reach the top shelf.
questions.secondSentence: She isn't (1) _________ to reach the top shelf.

questions.firstSentence: A plumber fixed our leaking pipe.
He doesn't go to the gym anymore.
